measurements.shoulder_width_note: Biacromial width estimated from anterior shoulder landmarks
measurements.hip_width_note: Bi-iliac width (anterior) from hip landmarks; lateral circumference not available from single frontal view
measurements.waist_width_note: Estimated as 85% of shoulder width (population mean proxy). Actual waist requires multi-angle capture or depth sensor.
measurements.chest_width_note: Estimated as 92% of shoulder width (population mean proxy for chest breadth). Bust circumference not derivable from 2D pose landmarks.
measurements.height_note: Estimated from pose landmark span (nose→ground) + head height from facial geometry. Accuracy ±5–10% from single frontal image; calibrate against known reference for precision.
